name: neonecho
plan: At War Materials with 22/180 cargo — nearly empty hold at a mining site. Priority one from the todo list: ore_refinement is 596/600 to L3, meaning just 4 more refinements unlock gas_processing. But wasting a dock cycle on 22 units is inefficient. Fill cargo first, then dock at War Citadel to refine (hitting L3 in the process) and sell. Darksteel ore is high-value — keep mining for more if the belt yields it. No threats detected, hull and fuel are full. Clean extraction loop.
currentGoal: Mine at War Materials until cargo is at least 80% full (~144 units). Prioritize darksteel, titanium, and iron ore. Keep the basic_tow_rig in cargo.
